name: Ormonde Mining plc
summary: Ormonde Mining plc engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral resource projects in Spain and Ireland. It holds interest in the Salamanca and Zamora Gold Projects consisting of 49% interest in three investigation permits in Salamanca province and 44% interest in two investigation permits in Zamora province, western Spain. The company was formerly known as Burmin Exploration and Development plc and changed its name to Ormonde Mining Plc in August 1995. Ormonde Mining Plc was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Clonee, Ireland.
